figure.title: PCS Block Diagram - Variant 2
figure.purpose: Shows an alternative or more detailed transmit and receive processing pipeline within the PCS.

technical_summary: Transmit path (Tx): Transcode, Scramble, Alignment Overwrite, Pre FEC distribution, FEC Encode, Distribution and interleave.
Receive path (Rx): Alignment lock and deskew, Lane reorder and de-interleave, FEC Decode, Post-FEC interleave, Alignment Overwrite, Descramble, Transcode.
In this variant, Transcode occurs before Scramble, and explicit interleaving/distribution steps are shown.

ordered_flow: Transcode -> Scramble -> Alignment Overwrite -> Pre FEC distribution -> FEC Encode -> Distribution and interleave

critical_facts: Distribution and interleaving are explicitly handled around the FEC encoding stage to improve error correction performance against burst errors.
